title: First day of the week in the mobile app calendar
excerpt:

posts.author: Wojtek (Wojtek)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I suggest adding regional settings to the iPhone/iPad mobile app. Currently, the browser version of the calendar displays Monday as the first day of the week, which is correct for my region. However, the mobile app displays Sunday as the first day of the week. It is not possible to change this setting in the iPhone mobile app, which is quite confusing and frustrating.

What are you trying to achieve

I would like the same regional settings to be visible in the browser version of the account and in the mobile app.

posts.author: WirkKarl (Karl)
posts.cookedHtml:
I totally understand your frustration — I’ve noticed the same issue on the mobile app. Having different start days for the week between browser and mobile can be really confusing, especially when planning tasks or deadlines.

It would be great if Monday.com allowed regional settings to sync across both platforms, so users don’t have to mentally adjust. Until then, I’ve been double-checking the browser view when scheduling important items, but it’s definitely not ideal. Hopefully this gets prioritized in a future update!
